title: 101. Project Tiger was launched in which year?
hint: It was launched during the early 1970s to protect India's declining tiger population.
summary: Project Tiger was launched by the Government of India in 1973 to conserve tigers and their habitats.

title: 102. Which animal is primarily protected under Project Tiger?
hint: It is India's national animal.
summary: Project Tiger focuses on the conservation of Bengal Tigers.

title: 103. Which state is home to the Ranthambore Tiger Reserve?
hint: This state is famous for its deserts and forts.
summary: Ranthambore Tiger Reserve is located in Rajasthan.

title: 104. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Uttarakhand and was India's first national park?
hint: It was formerly known as Hailey National Park.
summary: Corbett Tiger Reserve is India's oldest national park and a major tiger habitat.

title: 105. Which state has the Bandipur Tiger Reserve?
hint: Its capital is Bengaluru.
summary: Bandipur Tiger Reserve is located in Karnataka.

title: 106. Which Tiger Reserve is famous for inspiring Rudyard Kipling's Jungle Book?
hint: Mowgli is closely associated with this reserve.
summary: Pench Tiger Reserve inspired settings found in The Jungle Book.

title: 107. Which Tiger Reserve is located in the Sundarbans delta?
hint: It is known for mangrove forests and swimming tigers.
summary: Sundarbans Tiger Reserve lies in the world's largest mangrove ecosystem.

title: 108. Sariska Tiger Reserve is located in which state?
hint: It shares the state with Ranthambore.
summary: Sariska Tiger Reserve is located in Rajasthan.

title: 109. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Bihar?
hint: It lies near the Nepal border.
summary: Valmiki Tiger Reserve is Bihar's only tiger reserve.

title: 110. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Assam and is also a UNESCO World Heritage Site?
hint: It is famous for one-horned rhinoceroses and tigers.
summary: Manas Tiger Reserve is a UNESCO World Heritage Site in Assam.

title: 111. Which Tiger Reserve is spread across Madhya Pradesh and Maharashtra?
hint: It is associated with Mowgli stories.
summary: Pench Tiger Reserve spans Madhya Pradesh and Maharashtra.

title: 112. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Mizoram?
hint: It is the largest wildlife protected area in the state.
summary: Dampa Tiger Reserve is located in Mizoram.

title: 113. Which Tiger Reserve is known for the highest tiger density in India?
hint: Located in Madhya Pradesh.
summary: Bandhavgarh Tiger Reserve is known for very high tiger density.

title: 114. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Andhra Pradesh and Telangana?
hint: It is among India's largest tiger reserves.
summary: Nagarjunsagar-Srisailam Tiger Reserve extends across Andhra Pradesh and Telangana.

title: 115. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Odisha and contains a large river gorge ecosystem?
hint: The Mahanadi River flows through it.
summary: Satkosia Tiger Reserve is known for its spectacular gorge ecosystem.

title: 116. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Chhattisgarh and forms part of the Achanakmar-Amarkantak Biosphere Reserve?
hint: Its name begins with the same word as the biosphere reserve.
summary: Achanakmar Tiger Reserve is an important component of the Achanakmar-Amarkantak Biosphere Reserve.

title: 117. Which Tiger Reserve is famous for the successful reintroduction of tigers after local extinction?
hint: Located in Madhya Pradesh and known for a major conservation success story.
summary: Panna Tiger Reserve became a landmark example of tiger reintroduction and recovery.

title: 118. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Jharkhand?
hint: It was one of the original Project Tiger reserves.
summary: Palamau Tiger Reserve in Jharkhand was among the first reserves included under Project Tiger.

title: 119. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Arunachal Pradesh and is also one of India's largest protected areas?
hint: It is known for exceptional biodiversity and shares an international border.
summary: Namdapha Tiger Reserve is among India's largest protected areas and biodiversity hotspots.

title: 120. Which Tiger Reserve lies in the Western Ghats and is shared between Karnataka and Tamil Nadu through connected landscapes?
hint: It is part of the Nilgiri Biosphere Reserve landscape.
summary: Bandipur Tiger Reserve forms a crucial part of the Nilgiri landscape connecting multiple protected areas.

title: 121. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Maharashtra and is often called the 'Tiger Capital of Maharashtra'?
hint: It is famous for high tiger sightings and lies in eastern Maharashtra.
summary: Tadoba-Andhari Tiger Reserve is one of India's most successful tiger conservation landscapes.

title: 122. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Kerala and is famous for its artificial lake created by the Mullaperiyar Dam?
hint: It is one of the best places to observe elephants in South India.
summary: Periyar Tiger Reserve is known for its lake ecosystem and rich biodiversity.

title: 123. Which Tiger Reserve is situated in Odisha and is known for melanistic (pseudo-melanistic) tigers?
hint: It is also a biosphere reserve and national park.
summary: Similipal Tiger Reserve is famous for rare pseudo-melanistic tigers.

title: 124. Which Tiger Reserve was declared Rajasthan's third tiger reserve after Ranthambore and Sariska?
hint: It is located in southeastern Rajasthan near the Chambal region.
summary: Mukundra Hills Tiger Reserve became Rajasthan's third tiger reserve.

title: 125. Which Tiger Reserve became Rajasthan's fourth tiger reserve in 2022?
hint: It is located in Bundi district and was upgraded from a wildlife sanctuary.
summary: Ramgarh Vishdhari Tiger Reserve became Rajasthan's fourth tiger reserve in 2022.

title: 126. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Telangana after the bifurcation of Andhra Pradesh?
hint: Its name starts with the letter 'A' and it was carved out from a larger reserve.
summary: Amrabad Tiger Reserve is one of the largest tiger reserves in India and is located in Telangana.

title: 127. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Telangana and lies along the Godavari River basin?
hint: It shares its name with a nearby wildlife sanctuary.
summary: Kawal Tiger Reserve is located in northern Telangana.

title: 128. Which Tiger Reserve is the smallest tiger reserve in Maharashtra?
hint: Its name is only three letters long.
summary: Bor Tiger Reserve is the smallest tiger reserve in Maharashtra.

title: 129. Which Tiger Reserve is located in the Satpura mountain ranges?
hint: Its name is the same as the mountain range it occupies.
summary: Satpura Tiger Reserve is part of the Satpura-Maikal landscape.

title: 130. Which Tiger Reserve is famous for the conservation of the hard-ground barasingha?
hint: It is located in Madhya Pradesh.
summary: Kanha Tiger Reserve played a major role in saving the hard-ground swamp deer.

title: 131. Which Tiger Reserve lies in the Brahmaputra floodplain ecosystem?
hint: It is famous for rhinos as well as tigers.
summary: Kaziranga Tiger Reserve is situated in the Brahmaputra floodplain.

title: 132. Which Tiger Reserve is known as the 'Mini Kaziranga of Assam'?
hint: It has a very high density of wildlife in a comparatively small area.
summary: Orang Tiger Reserve is popularly called the Mini Kaziranga.

title: 133. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Arunachal Pradesh and was declared in 2017?
hint: Its name begins with 'K'.
summary: Kamlang Tiger Reserve became Arunachal Pradesh's second tiger reserve.

title: 134. Which Tiger Reserve forms part of the Nilgiri Biosphere Reserve in Tamil Nadu?
hint: It shares boundaries with Bandipur and Wayanad.
summary: Mudumalai Tiger Reserve is a key component of the Nilgiri Biosphere Reserve.

title: 135. Which Tiger Reserve is famous as the former stronghold of the forest brigand Veerappan?
hint: Located in Tamil Nadu and acts as an important wildlife corridor.
summary: Sathyamangalam Tiger Reserve is known for its strategic location between Western and Eastern Ghats.

title: 136. Which Tiger Reserve is situated in Kerala and Tamil Nadu across the Anamalai Hills landscape?
hint: Its earlier name was Indira Gandhi Wildlife Sanctuary.
summary: Anamalai Tiger Reserve is a major protected area in the Western Ghats.

title: 137. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Kerala and shares ecological connectivity with Anamalai?
hint: Its name starts with 'P' and is known for elephant populations.
summary: Parambikulam Tiger Reserve is one of the best-managed protected areas in India.

title: 138. Which Tiger Reserve became India's 50th Tiger Reserve?
hint: It is located in Rajasthan.
summary: Veerangana Durgavati Tiger Reserve became the 50th reserve, but Rajasthan's Ramgarh Vishdhari was the 52nd. The 50th officially notified reserve was Ranipur in Uttar Pradesh? (NTCA sequence often asked carefully).

title: 139. Which state has the highest number of Tiger Reserves in India?
hint: It is often called the Tiger State of India.
summary: Madhya Pradesh has the highest number of tiger reserves in India.

title: 140. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Uttar Pradesh?
hint: It lies in the Terai Arc Landscape.
summary: Pilibhit Tiger Reserve is an important part of the Terai ecosystem.

title: 141. Which Tiger Reserve was notified in Uttar Pradesh in 2022?
hint: It is located in the Bundelkhand region.
summary: Ranipur Tiger Reserve became Uttar Pradesh's fourth tiger reserve.

title: 142. The National Tiger Conservation Authority (NTCA) was established under which Act?
hint: The Act is India's primary wildlife protection legislation.
summary: NTCA was established under the Wildlife (Protection) Act, 1972 through amendments.

title: 143. Which Tiger Reserve is located in Chhattisgarh and is named after a major river of central India?
hint: The river flows westward into the Arabian Sea.
summary: Indravati Tiger Reserve derives its name from the Indravati River.

title: 144. Which Tiger Reserve was created from Udanti and Sitanadi Wildlife Sanctuaries?
hint: Its name combines two protected areas.
summary: Udanti-Sitanadi Tiger Reserve was formed by merging two wildlife sanctuaries.

title: 145. Which Tiger Reserve is famous for all five big cat species being reported from the landscape?
hint: Located in Arunachal Pradesh.
summary: Namdapha is one of the few places where tiger, leopard, clouded leopard and snow leopard habitats overlap.

title: 146. Which organization conducts the All India Tiger Estimation?
hint: It is India's apex tiger conservation authority.
summary: The National Tiger Conservation Authority coordinates tiger estimation exercises.

title: 147. Which Tiger Reserve is associated with the Buxa landscape?
hint: Located in West Bengal near Bhutan.
summary: Buxa Tiger Reserve lies in the eastern Himalayan foothills.

title: 148. Which Tiger Reserve is situated in the Terai region of Uttarakhand?
hint: It shares ecological connectivity with Nepal.
summary: Corbett Tiger Reserve forms an important part of the Terai Arc Landscape.

title: 149. Which state contains the Melghat Tiger Reserve?
hint: The reserve lies in the Satpura ranges.
summary: Melghat Tiger Reserve is located in Maharashtra.

title: 150. Which Tiger Reserve is located on the India-Bangladesh border and consists primarily of mangrove forests?
hint: It is the only mangrove tiger reserve in India.
summary: Sundarbans Tiger Reserve is famous for its mangrove ecosystem and swimming tigers.
